$description: iO Digital design tokens — W3C DTCG format. Extracted from iodigital.com CSS custom properties.

color.$description: All brand and semantic color tokens

blueHover.$description: Hover state for primary blue — buttons, scrollbar thumb hover

offWhite.$description: Alias of primary.offWhite; present as a distinct CSS variable in source

antraciet.$description: Dark neutral used for antracite-themed components

secondary.$description: Extended palette — accent and supporting hues

tertiary.$description: Tint pairs for tertiary accent colours (c = mid, d = light)

error.$description: Default error colour on light backgrounds

errorOnBlue.$description: Error colour for use on primary blue backgrounds

blueDark.$description: Alias of primary.blue; present as a distinct CSS variable in source

system.$description: Supplemental system color tokens from iO Brand Guidelines exports.

interactiveBlue.$description: Supplemental interactive/system blue from brand assets. Keep primary.blue (#0000D2) as the main Energetic Blue token.

typography.$description: Type scale, families, weights, and line heights

utility.$description: Utility fallback family preserved for compatibility

xs2.$description: 13px — card body text, nav utility, token browser UI

extraLight.$description: ExtraLight — hero headings and display text

extraBold.$description: ExtraBold — strong emphasis and nav labels

relaxed.$description: Relaxed — body copy, card descriptions, accordion body

loose.$description: Loose — paragraph text and block content

letterSpacing.$description: Letter spacing scale — uppercase labels, nav text, and tag/badge components

wide.$description: Wide tracking — uppercase tags, badge text, subsection labels

widest.$description: Widest tracking — sidebar nav group labels

32.$description: 128px — section vertical spacing at tablet breakpoint (8rem)

40.$description: 160px — section vertical spacing at desktop breakpoint (10rem)

spacing.$description: 4px-base spatial scale used for padding, margin, and gap. Keys follow Tailwind convention (step × 4px).

md.$description: Card resting shadow — soft ambient glow

xl.$description: Compound shadow — dropdown and raised panel elevation

2xl.$description: Deep shadow — large modals and overlay panels

focusRing.$description: Double-ring keyboard focus indicator — dark red inner + light pink outer halo

focusBlue.$description: Keyboard focus ring for blue-themed interactive elements

focusOrange.$description: Keyboard focus ring for orange-themed interactive elements

easing.$description: Snappy deceleration for panels and drawers

containerMax.$description: Maximum content container width — 1224px at 16px base

containerEdge.$description: Dynamic horizontal gutter — centres container on ultra-wide viewports

fixed.$description: Fixed-position elements — sticky bars below navigation

form.$description: Form component design tokens — extracted from iO Contact Us page CSS

borderWidthFocus.$description: Bottom-border thickness on focus — expands from 1px

fontSize.$description: Label font size in resting state (14px) — matches iodigital.com contact form

fontSizeFloating.$description: Label font size when floating above the field (12px)

fontWeight.$description: Label font weight — bold per iodigital.com brand

offsetTop.$description: Absolute top position of floating label

size.$description: Width and height of the checkbox (16px)

borderRadius.$description: Corner radius of the checkbox square

paddingRight.$description: Right padding — space reserved for the custom chevron icon

focus.$description: Double-ring focus indicator used on all interactive form elements

indicatorBg.$description: Background of the error tooltip block (color.semantic.brightPink)

indicatorSize.$description: Width/height of the rotated square tooltip arrow (16px)

fastest.$description: Instant feedback — checkbox tick, focus ring, tab indicator

snappy.$description: Fast start, smooth deceleration — used on buttons and panels

bounce.$description: Ease-in-out variant — used on link underline hover animations

easeOut.$description: Standard ease-out — Material/Tailwind standard, majority of contact page UI transitions

component.$description: Semantic component-level aliases mapping raw tokens to component roles

transition.$description: Full shorthand transition applied to all button variants

focus.$description: Shared keyboard focus ring used across all interactive components

ringCss.$description: Complete box-shadow shorthand — dark red inner + light pink outer halo

carousel.$description: Content carousel / slider tokens extracted from iO 'Related articles' section (ContentCarouselItem + Slider CSS modules)

slideWidth.$description: Width of each slide card at desktop breakpoint

slideGap.$description: Gap between slide cards (gap-4 in source)

imageAspectRatio.$description: Aspect ratio of the card image area

pillBg.$description: Background of the content-type pill overlay — alias of color.primary.offWhite

pillRadius.$description: Border radius of the pill — full capsule shape

pillFontSize.$description: Font size of pill label text

scrollbarHeight.$description: Height of the custom horizontal scrollbar track

scrollbarColor.$description: Scrollbar thumb color — alias of color.primary.blue

scrollbarTrackColor.$description: Scrollbar track border colour — blue at 30% opacity

navButtonSize.$description: Width and height of the circular prev/next navigation buttons (lg breakpoint)

navButtonBorder.$description: Border colour of nav buttons — alias of color.neutral.greyTwo

accordion.$description: Accordion / CollapsibleSection component tokens extracted from iO 'Our expertise' section

borderColor.$description: 1px border-bottom on each item and border-top on the first

triggerPaddingY.$description: Vertical padding on the trigger button (top and bottom)

titleHoverIndent.$description: padding-left added to title text on trigger hover

titleTransition.$description: Transition for title indent animation on hover

iconSize.$description: Width and height of the +/− icon box

iconHoverScale.$description: scale() applied to the icon on trigger hover

iconTransition.$description: Transition for icon scale and bar rotation

panelPaddingBottom.$description: Bottom padding of expanded panel content (6rem on desktop)

link.$description: Animated underline patterns extracted from iO CSS (.inline-link and .text-link-standalone)

underlineDuration.$description: Duration in ms for underline grow/shrink — 0.35s as used in source CSS

underlineEasing.$description: Easing for underline animation — alias of motion.easing.bounce

inlineUnderline.$description: Underlined at rest, underline slides out to the right on hover (background-size → 0 1px). Used on telephone numbers.

standaloneUnderline.$description: No underline at rest, underline grows from the left on hover (background-size → 100% 1px). Used on standalone CTAs like 'Get Directions'.

brand.$description: Brand metadata and usage rules sourced from local iO Brand Guidelines HTML exports.

logotype.$description: Rules extracted from Logotype _ iO Brand Guidelines.html

allowedColours.name: White / Negative
allowedColours.usage: Most common treatment; prefer white logotype where contrast allows.

allowedColours.name: Black / Positive
allowedColours.usage: Use when white logotype creates insufficient contrast.

allowedColours.name: Energetic Blue Accent
allowedColours.usage: Apply on calm backgrounds (base colours or fifth element).

placementNotes: Use one of the approved placements; default to bottom-right or top-left when unsure.
Alternative oversized placement is only permitted at the bottom-right corner of an artboard.
logotype.clearspaceRule: Minimal clearspace = logotype height x 0.5 on all sides.
logotype.avatarRule: Primary avatar execution uses a blue background with a white logotype.

tokens.$description: Tokenized logotype primitives for implementation and docs parity.

defaultColorDark.$description: Default positive logotype color on light backgrounds.

defaultColorLight.$description: Default negative logotype color on dark backgrounds.

accentColor.$description: Accent logotype color on calm/light surfaces.

avatarForeground.$description: Primary avatar execution foreground logotype color.

clearspaceFactor.$description: Minimum clearspace multiplier relative to the logotype height.

placementDefault.$description: Default approved placement for most layouts.

dos: Use the logotype in a solid colour with high contrast.
Follow placement rules whenever placing the logotype.
Use alternative placement only when the format allows it.
donts: Never place the logotype with low tonal contrast against the background.
Do not rotate the logo in print applications (rotation is allowed in animation).
Do not change the logo colour to non-approved colours.
Do not distort proportions or scale logo elements independently.
Do not apply gradients to the logo.
colourTreatmentNotes: Logotype is mainly used in black or white.
On simple/light backgrounds (including fifth element or secondary colours), primary blue logotype may be used.
Secondary colours may be used with logotype on a primary blue background.

iodigitalComVersion.note: Section captured from local export heading and download CTA.

localVariations.note: Section captured from local export with per-variation download links.

colourGuidelines.$description: Rules extracted from Colours _ iO Brand Guidelines.html
colourGuidelines.accentSummary: Energetic Blue is the most recognisable colour and strongest brand carrier.
colourGuidelines.basePaletteSummary: Base colours are primarily used as backdrops and are rarely mixed with one another.
treatment: When combining colours, stick to one base colour plus the accent colour.
Use accent colour for one strong message; use base colours for more complex content.
Tone background colours down when adding more elements.
Limit background colour usage for long, complex messages.
backgroundGuidance: Always ensure good contrast between background and message elements.
Negative space is a design element; give content room to breathe.
dos: Primary blue can be used in smaller doses and still carry the brand.
Energetic Blue can be combined with any base colour.
donts: Avoid mixing multiple base colours in the same composition.
Do not mix too many colours and elements in one artboard.

tonedDownVariantMapping.note: Source states all base colours have toned-down versions; mapped to existing secondary/background tokens in this token set.

imagery.$description: Rules and links extracted from Imagery & Video _ iO Brand Guidelines.html
usageNotes: Imagery and video are key assets that bring the brand to life.
Use the curated iO libraries to keep visual style consistent.

graphicElements.$description: Detailed child-page content is pending; parent export confirms section structure and target URLs.

graphicObjects.descriptor: Parent page references Rounded Triangle, The Blue Line, and Campus Stamp sections.

fifthElement.descriptor: Parent page references start, treatment, placement, and version sections.

dynamicTagline.descriptor: Parent page references start and treatment sections.

typographyGuidelines.$description: Policy metadata extracted from Typography _ iO Brand Guidelines.html

primaryFont.usage: Primary font across core brand applications and office tools.

brandingFont.usage: Used for paid ads and social media (licensed font).

dos: Create confident typographic expressions that support message hierarchy.
Use modular scale principles for proportional hierarchy and readability.
donts: Never use Manrope in paid ads or social media assets.
Never use low-contrast colours; avoid non-approved colours on imagery.
Never use blue text on busy imagery backgrounds.

color.$description: CSS custom properties with prefix "--color-*" found on iodigital.com

container.$description: CSS custom properties with prefix "--container-*" found on iodigital.com

font.$description: CSS custom properties with prefix "--font-*" found on iodigital.com

innervw.$description: CSS custom properties with prefix "--innervw-*" found on iodigital.com

max.$description: CSS custom properties with prefix "--max-*" found on iodigital.com

pageStyles.$description: Most-used CSS class selectors detected across scraped iodigital.com pages

pageComponents.$description: Component-like class blocks and custom elements discovered across scraped pages

blocks.$description: Top class block names (BEM-like base names)

customElements.$description: Custom element tags detected in the DOM
